summary: Admin customers page successfully implements the required success state with proper table structure, controls, and data display. The interface uses appropriate dark theme styling consistent with admin surfaces, includes all required controls (search, status filter, billing health sort), and displays customer data in a readable table format. Minor areas for improvement include enhancing visual hierarchy and ensuring complete mobile responsiveness.

violations.description: Table header visual hierarchy could be enhanced - billing health sort toggle functionality may not be clearly indicated to users
Search input and filter controls layout could benefit from improved spacing and visual grouping for better UX

actions: Consider adding visual indicators (arrows/icons) to the billing health header to clearly show sort functionality
Review control grouping and spacing to improve the visual relationship between search and filter elements
Verify that the current responsive design maintains usability at the specified 390px mobile baseline
Ensure quick action buttons (suspend/impersonate) have sufficient contrast and touch targets for accessibility
